narrative: Small healthcare clinic (42 employees) running Microsoft Exchange 2019, Windows Server 2019, Veeam Backup, Meditech EHR. CVE-2023-23397 is publicly known; a BlackBasta ransomware campaign is actively targeting healthcare; a high-confidence abuse IP is probing the network. Expert expectation: Intelligence flags ransomware + Exchange-targeted pulses; Validator surfaces CVE-2023-23397 + Veeam CVEs and maps to T1486 (data encrypted for impact) + T1190; Hardening rotates ports and refreshes certs; Investigator publishes a critical posture around 32 (Grade F) and the orchestrator routes to Remediator; Remediator proposes IP block + MFA force + endpoint isolate + incident ticket; Supervisor escalates to human review.
